chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-378 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 07.08.2017 Mr. Imdad Ali Memon, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Faisal Nadeem Abro, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahar, State Counsel a/w ASI Muhammad Bux of P.S Tando Ghulam Ali District Badin. = Mr. Abdul Haque Laghari, Advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.4, 6 and 7 alongwith affidavit in objection to the constitutional petition, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioners. Learned Additional A.G files statements on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3, which are also taken on record and copies whereof have also been supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioners. Learned Counsel for the petitioners after going through the statements filed by the respondents No.2 and 3 has no objection for the disposal of this petition, if directions are given to the respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioners. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with the directions to the respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioners and further that the police officials should discharge their duties in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners, whenever they approach them with such request, but strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
